zh.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire是William de Tregoz的兒子，於1100年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可比林福德。他和Agnes de Lucy至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1169年在英國英格蘭維爾爾可利可拉德享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire was born in 1100, in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of William de Tregoz. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Lucy. He died in 1169, in Cricklade, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire est né en 1100, à Billingford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William de Tregoz. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Lucy. Il est décédé en 1169, à Cricklade, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire wurde 1100 in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William de Tregoz geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes de Lucy mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Cricklade, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire è nato il nel 1100 nel Billingford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William de Tregoz. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Lucy. Morì nel 1169, nel Cricklade, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshireは1100年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクビリングフォードでWilliam de Tregozの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnes de Lucyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1169年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアクリックラドで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire(은)는 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 빌링퍼드에서 William de Tregoz의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes de Lucy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 크릭라드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire nasceu em 1100, em Billingford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William de Tregoz. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Lucy. Ele faleceu em 1169, em Cricklade, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire родился в 1100 г. в местности биллингфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William de Tregoz. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes de Lucy. Он умер в 1169 г. в местности крикклад, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire nació en 1100, en Billingford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William de Tregoz. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Lucy. Murió en 1169, en Cricklade, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
